flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Merritt College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($564 → $766).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Merritt College fell 35% between 2007 and 2010 (14.4% → 9.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Merritt College rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Merritt College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.9k).
